additionalDescription: For each annotated recording, they indicate all the species present and whether the species is in the foreground or background.
captureDevice: AudioMoth and Raspberry Pi-based autonomous recording units
description: Bird acoustic monitoring dataset from the Mount Kenya ecosystem containing more than 20 hours of expert-annotated audio recordings used to compare traditional point counts, passive acoustic monitoring, citizen science observations, and machine learning approaches for bird species monitoring. 2701 files (160 files annotated) come from a previous dataset.
locality: Mount Kenya ecosystem. Two sites: Dedan Kimathi University Wildlife Conservancy (DeKUWC) and the Mt Kenya National Park (MKNP)
name: Ndege Zetu
title: Ndege Zetu: A dataset to compare bird species monitoring approaches in the Mt Kenya ecosystem
